{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Gates
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Travelers]] pop out of [[Gates]] to cause havoc.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Travelers]] used to live in [[Alin's Territory]] to hold [[Gates]] open.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"You should have seen it when Travelers lived here to hold Gates open, and people came and went..."<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
